message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "Upstream" {
    component Producer as P1 <<(C,green)>>
    component Adapter as A1 <<(A,green)>>
}

component Transport as T1 <<(S,green)>>

package "Gateway" {
    component Adapter as A2 <<(A,green)>>
    component Consumer as C1 <<(C,green)>>
    
    package "JobExecution" {
        component GatewayJobHandler as GJH <<(C,green)>>
    }
}

component Gateway as GW <<(C,green)>>
component Producer as P2 <<(C,green)>>
component Adapter as A3 <<(A,green)>>

component Transport as T2 <<(S,green)>>

package "Downstream" {
    component Adapter as A4 <<(A,green)>>
    component Consumer as C2 <<(C,green)>>
}

package "JobExecution" {
    component DownstreamJobHandler as DJH <<(C,green)>>
}

component LowerLayer as LL <<(S,green)>>

P1 -> A1 : publish(command)
A1 -> T1 : publish(command)
T1 -> A2 : execute(command)
A2 -> C1 : handler(command, done)
C1 ..> GJH : subscribe("done")
GJH ..> GW : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)
GW -> P2 : publish(command)
P2 -> A3 : publish(command)
A3 -> T2 : publish(command)
T2 -> A4 : execute(command)
A4 -> C2 : handler(command, done)
C2 ..> DJH : subscribe("done")
DJH ..> LL : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)
LL -> DJH : done()
DJH ..> C2 : emit("done")
C2 -> A4 : done(response)
A4 -> T2 : getDelay(command)\n(done(response))
T2 -> A3 : emit("response", response)
A3 -> P2 : handler("response")
P2 -> A3 : onTimeout(getDelay())\n.....\nunsubscribe()
A3 -> GW : resolve(responses)
GW -> GJH : done()
GJH ..> C1 : emit("done")
C1 -> A2 : done(response)
A2 -> T1 : done(response)
T1 -> A1 : emit("response", response)
A1 -> P1 : handler("response")
P1 -> A1 : onTimeout(getDelay())\n.....\nunsubscribe()
A1 -> T1 : emit("response", response)
T1 -> A1 : getDelay(command)
A1 -> P1 : handler("response")
P1 -> A1 : onTimeout(getDelay())\n.....\nunsubscribe()
A1 -> P1 : resolve()
P1 -> A1 : subscribe(handler)
A1 -> T1 : subscribe("response")
T1 -> A1 : resolve()
A3 -> P2 : resolve()
P2 -> A3 : subscribe(handler)
A3 -> T2 : subscribe("response")
T2 -> A3 : resolve()

@enduml
```
